response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video for scenes and on-screen text. Detected song title "FG ROADSTER" and performer "FLOW GLOW" during the performance section. 2. Performed web search for "FG ROADSTER FLOW GLOW Japanese and English lyrics". 3. Extracted lyrics and formatted the JSON accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video features a montage showcasing various Hololive groups and generations, followed by a musical performance of the song "FG ROADSTER" by the unit FLOW GLOW.

scenes.description: Intro screen for "hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE".
A fast-paced montage of different Hololive groups, including FLOW GLOW, Justice, ReGLOSS, Advent, and various numbered generations, with short musical jingles accompanying each introduction.
The unit FLOW GLOW performs the song "FG ROADSTER" on stage. On-screen text includes the title and credits for the song.
